summary: Reflective blog post on coping with pandemic anxiety by spending time with horses, framed around Cavallo customers staying calm during COVID isolation.
Educational article on underrun heels in horses, explaining the degenerative hoof condition, its causes, and how hoof geometry affects weight-bearing and soundness.
Educational article by Carole Herder on White Line Disease in horse hooves, covering causes, detection, and natural treatments like apple cider vinegar, iodine, and tea tree oil.
Product announcement for new Trek/BFB hoof boot buckle straps as an alternative to Velcro for extreme conditions like ice and spear-grass, with a how-to video.
Checklist of 12 factors to evaluate when buying quality hoof boots, covering value, ease of use, safety, fit, and durability, with an accompanying video.
Educational article by Carole Herder on heel-bulb injuries in horses, covering common causes, internal anatomy, infection risks, and why these wounds heal slowly.
Customer story about Uxia, a Barcelona equine educator promoting barefoot and natural horsemanship in Spain, and her transformative journey with her horse Cissa.
Company profile of Cavallo as a female-owned hoof boot business founded by Carole Herder in 1993, covering its origins, Roberts Creek BC location, and product history.
Profile of Scott Wilburn, Cavallo's Trimmer of the Month, a farrier in Kenai, Alaska, covering his Coast Guard background and barefoot-trimming work with Cavallo boots.
Advice article on transitioning horses from metal shoes to barefoot for spring, explaining hoof-flex benefits and using Cavallo boots on trails when needed.
Article on using Cavallo hoof boots during horse transport for comfort and traction in the trailer, including pad options and measuring for fit over shod hooves.
Q&A by Carole Herder on using Cavallo hoof boots for veterinary hoof rehab, addressing a laminitis case and how boots plus gel/cushion pads aid healing and alignment.
